summary: Completed comprehensive testing of Budget Request module. Fixed critical SKU dropdown bug. All backend APIs (15/15 tests) passed. Frontend UI testing successful for all major flows including create, draft, submit, and Director approval workflow.
updated_files: /app/frontend/src/pages/BudgetRequest.js - Fixed SKU array destructuring (setSkus was receiving {skus: [...]} instead of [...] array)
seed_data_creation: Created test budget requests during backend API testing (prefixed with TEST_)
context_for_next_testing_agent: Budget Request module fully implemented and tested. Key endpoints: GET/POST /api/budget-requests, PUT /api/budget-requests/{id}/approve, GET /api/budget-categories, GET /api/cogs/sku-price/{city}/{sku_name}. Director role can approve/reject requests. SKU-required categories show SKU dropdown and bottle count fields.

Backend API Tests.GET /api/budget-categories: PASS - Returns all 9 categories with correct requires_lead and requires_sku flags
Backend API Tests.POST /api/budget-requests (submit): PASS - Submits for approval, creates action item for Director
Backend API Tests.GET /api/budget-requests: PASS - Returns user's requests, Director sees pending approvals
Backend API Tests.PUT /api/budget-requests/{id}/cancel: PASS - User can cancel own request
Backend API Tests.GET /api/cogs/sku-price/{city}/{sku}: PASS - Returns SKU minimum landing price

Frontend UI Tests.Event Details section: PASS - Event Name, Date, City fields all work
Frontend UI Tests.Budget Items editable grid: PASS - Add Item button adds row, Remove button works
Frontend UI Tests.Lead/Customer field (conditional): PASS - Shows for customer-related categories only
Frontend UI Tests.SKU and Bottles fields (conditional): PASS - Shows for SKU-required categories, SKU dropdown populated
Frontend UI Tests.Submit for Approval button: PASS - Creates pending approval for Director
Frontend UI Tests.Director approval flow: PASS - Director sees pending, can approve/reject with reason
Frontend UI Tests.Sidebar navigation: PASS - Budget Request under REQUESTS section, highlighted when active

bug_fixed.issue: SKU dropdown crashed with 'skus.map is not a function' error when selecting SKU-required category
bug_fixed.root_cause: /api/master-skus returns {skus: [...]} but code was setting state with response.data directly instead of response.data.skus
bug_fixed.fix_applied: Changed setSkus(skuRes.data || []) to setSkus(skuRes.data?.skus || skuRes.data || []) in BudgetRequest.js line 323
bug_fixed.verified: SKU dropdown now works correctly, shows all 7 SKUs
